In ancient Chinese mythology, Baize is a: In ancient Chinese mythology, Baize is an auspicious divine beast of high status. It is said to understand all things under heaven, speak human language, and know the names, forms and ways to subdue spirits and strange beings. The Yellow Emperor once consulted Baize and recorded its knowledge as the Baize Tu, using it to understand the world, avoid misfortune and protect the people.
